summary.en: Colombia fire-safety obligations are site and authority dependent. Law 1575 of 2012 establishes the national fire-service framework, while BESS projects may also need municipal, building, insurer, workplace-safety, emergency-response, and project-owner review. RETIE electrical compliance and battery safety reports do not by themselves close thermal-runaway, separation, ventilation, gas detection, fire suppression, access, water supply, and emergency-response expectations.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚消防安全义务取决于场址和主管机关。2012年第1575号法律建立国家消防服务框架，BESS项目还可能需要市政、建筑、保险、职业安全、应急响应和项目业主审查。RETIE电气合规和电池安全报告本身不能覆盖热失控、间距、通风、气体探测、灭火、通道、消防水源和应急响应要求。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞消防安全義務取決於場址和主管機關。2012年第1575號法律建立國家消防服務框架，BESS項目還可能需要市政、建築、保險、職業安全、應急響應和項目業主審查。RETIE電氣合規和電池安全報告本身不能覆蓋熱失控、間距、通風、氣體探測、滅火、通道、消防水源和應急響應要求。

standards_or_laws: Project fire-safety design and emergency-response requirements

summary.en: China BESS projects commonly reference GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, container fire designs, and local Chinese fire review documents. These can support due diligence but do not replace Colombian local fire-authority, insurer, emergency-response, or owner acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国BESS项目通常引用GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集装箱消防设计和中国地方消防审查文件。这些资料可支持尽调，但不能替代哥伦比亚地方消防主管机关、保险方、应急响应或业主接受要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS項目通常引用GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集裝箱消防設計和中國地方消防審查文件。這些資料可支持盡調，但不能替代哥倫比亞地方消防主管機關、保險方、應急響應或業主接受要求。

gap.en: Prepare a Spanish fire-safety package with site layout, separation distances, ventilation, gas detection, fire detection and suppression logic, emergency shutdown, access routes, water or agent assumptions, thermal-runaway mitigation evidence, SDS, and emergency response procedures.
gap.zh: 应准备西班牙语消防安全资料包，包括场址布置、间距、通风、气体探测、火灾探测及灭火逻辑、紧急停机、通道、水源或灭火剂假设、热失控缓解证据、SDS和应急响应程序。
gap.zht: 應準備西班牙語消防安全資料包，包括場址佈置、間距、通風、氣體探測、火災探測及滅火邏輯、緊急停機、通道、水源或滅火劑假設、熱失控緩解證據、SDS和應急響應程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where local fire, building, workplace-safety, municipal, insurer, or permit review applies; detailed BESS tests and design criteria are project-specific unless expressly incorporated
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation location, and local fire review

source.publisher: Departamento Administrativo de la Funcion Publica, Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fire review is a separate Colombia project workstream. Battery test reports and RETIE files should be supplemented with site-specific fire and emergency-response evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 消防审查是哥伦比亚项目的独立工作流。电池测试报告和RETIE文件应补充场址特定消防及应急响应证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 消防審查是哥倫比亞項目的獨立工作流。電池測試報告和RETIE文件應補充場址特定消防及應急響應證據。
